events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: a flat/horizontal vent run below the fixture flood level rim is a code violation (IPC 905.3/905.4, UPC 906.2/906.3) — the vent isn't maintaining slope/rise above the flood rim, risking submersion, loss of trap seal, and sewer gas intrusion. Marked **fail**, high risk, `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, with corrective action to reroute the vent above flood rim elevation before closeout.
